title: US-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: Tanker hit by ‘large explosion’ off Kuwait, causing oil spill; Iran launches missiles at Israel
content:
Reports indicate escalating tensions in the US-Israel-Iran conflict.
*   A tanker near Kuwait was struck by a large explosion, resulting in an oil spill.
*   Iran has launched missiles targeting Israel.

title: ITF W35 women’s tennis tournament Kalaburagi: Ankita Raina and Zeel Desai advance to second round, but local favourite Soha Sadiq bows out
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Ankita Raina and Zeel Desai have advanced to the second round.
*   Local favourite Soha Sadiq was eliminated from the tournament.
*   These results are from the ITF W35 women’s tennis tournament taking place in Kalaburagi.

title: Sci-tech projects from 17 schools and 60 college groups showcased at Anna University on National Science Day
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Sci-tech projects from 17 schools and 60 college groups were showcased.
*   The event took place at Anna University.
*   It was held in observance of National Science Day.

title: Ceramic industry in Gujarat's Morbi stares at shutdown as West Asia conflict disrupts gas supply
content:
The ceramic industry in Morbi, Gujarat, is facing a potential shutdown.
*   This threat stems from a disruption in their crucial gas supply.
*   The gas supply issues are a direct consequence of the ongoing conflict in West Asia.

title: Internal reservation: Dalit Ministers hold meetings to arrive at a consensus ahead of Karnataka Cabinet meeting on March 5
content:
Dalit Ministers are holding meetings to discuss the issue of internal reservation.
*   The primary aim of these meetings is to arrive at a consensus among the Dalit Ministers.
*   This consensus is sought ahead of the Karnataka Cabinet meeting scheduled for March 5.

title: T.N. CM launches Integrated Drinking Water Grievance Redressal Centre
content:
The Tamil Nadu Chief Minister (T.N. CM) inaugurated a new centre.
*   This centre is specifically designed to address public grievances related to drinking water.
*   It is an "Integrated" system, suggesting a comprehensive or unified approach to resolving these issues.

title: KGMCTA defers strike for a week following Kerala government assurances
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The KGMCTA (Kerala Government Medical College Teachers' Association) has postponed its planned strike.
*   The strike deferment is for a duration of one week.
*   This decision was made after the association received assurances from the Kerala government.

title: Textiles Minister inaugurates new Bypass Road in Ranipet
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Textiles Minister has inaugurated a new Bypass Road.
*   The newly constructed bypass road is located in Ranipet.
*   This infrastructure project aims to improve connectivity and traffic flow in the region.

title: CBI launches probe into Puducherry counterfeit drugs case
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) has launched an official probe.
*   The investigation targets a case involving counterfeit (fake) drugs.
*   The incident and subsequent probe are focused on Puducherry.

title: Kerala government opens option for declaring wildlife trophy
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   The Kerala government has introduced a new option for individuals to officially declare possession of wildlife trophies.
*   This move aims to provide a legal framework for individuals to regularize ownership of such items, which may have been acquired previously.
*   It is intended to help track and regulate existing wildlife possessions, potentially curbing illegal trade and ensuring accountability for items like antlers, skins, or taxidermied animals.
